players.name: Toast
players.offerings: POS, payroll, scheduling, online ordering, kitchen display, inventory management
players.target_customers: Full-service and QSR restaurants of all sizes
players.differentiators: Hardware + software bundle, $1.1B ARR, 106,000+ restaurant locations

players.name: Square for Restaurants
players.offerings: Cloud POS, floor plan management, online ordering, KDS, inventory
players.differentiators: No upfront hardware cost, Square ecosystem (payments, payroll), strong SMB brand

players.name: Lightspeed Restaurant
players.offerings: Cloud POS, table management, menu management, reporting, supplier management
players.differentiators: Strong international presence, multi-location support, recent acquisition of Upserve

players.name: Olo
players.offerings: Digital ordering, delivery dispatch, guest data platform, pay-at-table
players.differentiators: Deep enterprise integrations, 2B+ digital orders processed, DoorDash/Uber Eats direct integration

players.name: TouchBistro
players.offerings: iPad POS, reservations, inventory, staff management, marketing
players.differentiators: Restaurant-first design, dedicated support, strong Canadian market presence

startups.velocity_note: Most recent funding activity from 2022-2024. Market showing post-COVID consolidation with later-stage deals.

market_scan.notes: Restaurant management software market TAM from Grand View Research ($25B, 2024). CAGR corroborated by Mordor Intelligence. High confidence given multiple independent sources with consistent figures.

judgement.summary: 5 incumbents identified. 4 startups ($131M known funding). TAM ~$25.0B. CAGR ~11.2%. Competitive density or weak growth limits opportunity.
